summary: Lead started M4-STRESS-VALIDATION-001 after M4-DETERMINISM-REPLAY-001 closed on main and taskctl ready promoted stress validation to READY.

tests_run.result: main was clean and synchronized before creating test/m4-stress-validation.

decisions: Start M4-STRESS-VALIDATION-001 as the next READY M4 task after deterministic replay closure.
Use test_engineer writer and independent qa_reviewer per task owner/reviewer roles.
Keep validation scoped to measured M4 stress evidence and avoid product scope expansion.
risks: Stress validation may expose ordinary fixable test or scenario failures; route those back to the writer unless they trigger a Human Gate.
requested_action: Writer should implement scoped M4 stress validation evidence and produce a valid REVIEW handoff routed to qa_reviewer.
